name: wipesnap
description: Wipesnap - Portable Identity & Workspace Automation Engine
author: Wipesnap

scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:functions-package && node scripts/audit-engine.js && npm run probe:lifecycle && npm audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/main/index.js && node --check src/main/engine.js && node --check src/main/appManifest.js && node --check src/main/appAdapters.js && node --check src/main/staleAppData.js && node --check src/main/ipcValidation.js && node --check src/main/importReservations.js && node --check src/main/ipcTrust.js && node --check src/main/ipcAuthorization.js && node --check src/main/sessionVaultCapture.js && node --check src/main/processControlHandlers.js && node --check src/main/electronShellHardening.js && node --check src/main/capabilityStore.js && node --check src/main/accountSlots.js && node --check src/main/cloudDraftSchema.js && node --check src/main/cloudDraftImport.js && node --check src/main/cloudSyncEnvelope.js && node --check src/main/cloudSyncRulesPolicy.js && node --check src/main/cloudSyncIngestion.js && node --check src/main/sanitizedPresetSnapshot.js && node --check src/main/safePresetPatch.js && node --check src/main/workspaceCapabilityMigration.js && node --check src/main/workspaceCapabilityHandlers.js && node --check src/main/workspaceHealth.js && node --check src/main/vaultMetadata.js && node --check src/main/vaultDurability.js && node --check src/main/pinLockout.js && node --check src/main/launchArgs.js && node --check src/preload/index.js && node --check src/phone-planner/phonePlannerCore.js && node --check src/phone-planner/phonePlannerStorage.js && node --check src/phone-planner/app.js && node --check src/phone-planner/service-worker.js && node --check scripts/phone-planner-server.cjs && node --check scripts/audit-engine.js && node --check scripts/lifecycle-probe.js && node --check scripts/sync-cloud-sync-functions.cjs && node --check tests/cloudSyncLiveEmulator.live.js && node --check functions/index.cjs
scripts.test:firebase-live: npx --yes firebase-tools@15.15.0 emulators:exec --project wipesnap-phase21-live --only firestore,auth,functions "node --experimental-default-type=module --test tests/cloudSyncLiveEmulator.live.js"
scripts.package: electron-vite build && node -e "delete process.env.ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE; require('child_process').execSync('npx electron-builder --win zip', {stdio:'inherit', env:process.env})"
